content:
_____user
What's the Bitcoin and ETH price?

Fetching Bitcoin and ETH prices now.
_____javascript
const url = "https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=bitcoin,ethereum&vs_currencies=usd"
return await fetch(url).then(r => r.json())

_____framework
execution success
result↓
bitcoin:
  usd: 70740
ethereum:
